resolved_blockers: B1 CRITICAL (TC-06, anti-goal): FIXED — verified root cause was non-offloaded synchronous store/encode I/O on the event-loop thread in auto_session.run_auto_session (the manual session_routes path already offloads via asyncio.to_thread; the auto path did not). All store/encode calls now offloaded via asyncio.to_thread (no process pool / no pipeline change / manual path untouched). New regression guard test_headless_loop_does_not_block_event_loop fails pre-fix (0.98s blocked) and passes post-fix (<0.5s).

B2 P1 (browser-qa UT-03, J-07): FIXED — App.tsx now polls the session-tab list every 5s + on window focus and additively merges unknown backend session IDs into liveSessions, so a headless session appears in the dropdown without a manual reload (no removal/rename/reorder/active-session change).
B3 P1 (browser-qa UT-06, J-09): FIXED — BestBadge exported and rendered in the expanded IterationDetailView header via an isBest prop threaded from IterationPanel using bestIterationId.
backend_tests: 140 passed, 1 failed (pre-existing out-of-scope directions-cache; +16 new test_auto_session, 0 new regressions)
frontend_build: npm run build (tsc + vite) EXIT 0 clean
qa_summary: 22/22 functional test cases PASS. Backend 140/1 (pre-existing). All anti-goals hold in practice. UI evolution: UI-PASS-WITH-GAPS. One non-blocking quality gap: AutoRunBar can show a stale terminal status for a freshly-opened still-running session under rapid multi-session switching (session-list running spinner mitigates; recommended for J-10/iter-2 ownership hardening — already on dev Known Issues).
